name: non-strict mode auto-demotes a rule with a stale pr-corpus source from error to warn
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/last-fetch && printf '2026-04-01T00:00:00Z
' > .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/last-fetch/cfpb.txt && printf 'rule_id: r1
severity: error
provenance:
  - {class: pr-corpus, source_id: cfpb}
' > rule.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/freshness-gate.sh" --rule rule.yaml --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z --freshness-window 24h 2>out.txt && grep -q 'action=demote' out.txt && grep -q 'from=error to=warn' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
